message:
You know that one friend who panics at the slightest hint of danger? Yeah, that's totally me when it comes to fire safety! Just the other day, I was trying to cook dinner while also thinking about our escape plan in case of a fire. I mean, what if the smoke alarms start blaring while I’m flipping pancakes? 

So, I called my friend, and she started freaking out about how I should have an emergency bag ready and memorize all the exits in the house. Honestly, it was a bit much, but it did remind me how important it is to have a fire escape plan and to check the smoke alarms regularly. 

After our chat, I took a moment to review our safety measures, and it felt good to be a little more prepared. Sometimes a gentle nudge from a panicky friend is just what we need, right? Have you ever had a moment where you realized you needed to be a bit more prepared?
